SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" / f."Enrollment (K-12)") AS highest_eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Alameda'
  AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
  AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" <> 0
  AND f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT
    CDSCode,
    CASE WHEN "Enrollment (K-12)" = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" END AS eligible_free_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        CDSCode,
        "Enrollment (K-12)",
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
WHERE rn IN (10, 11);	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH closed_counts AS (
  SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS closed_cnt
  FROM schools
  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY County
),
max_county AS (
  SELECT County
  FROM closed_counts
  ORDER BY closed_cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT s.School AS school_name, s.ClosedDate AS closure_date
FROM schools s
JOIN max_county mc ON s.County = mc.County
WHERE s.StatusType = 'Closed'
ORDER BY s.School;	----- bird -----	california_schools

84:
WITH admin_names AS (
  SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
),
top_names AS (
  SELECT first_name
  FROM admin_names
  GROUP BY first_name
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 2
)
SELECT tn.first_name, s.District
FROM top_names tn
JOIN schools s
  ON s.AdmFName1 = tn.first_name
     OR s.AdmFName2 = tn.first_name
     OR s.AdmFName3 = tn.first_name
ORDER BY tn.first_name, s.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT a.account_id,
       ( (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) -
         (SELECT MIN(d.A11) FROM client c JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
          WHERE c.gender='F' AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F'))
       ) AS gap
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender='F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT MIN(d2.A11) FROM client c2 JOIN district d2 ON c2.district_id = d2.district_id

116:
WITH first_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
client_account AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, a.account_id
    FROM first_loan fl
    JOIN account a ON a.account_id = fl.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN client c ON c.client_id = d.client_id
),
bal_1993 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN client_account ca ON t.account_id = ca.account_id
    WHERE t.date = '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
bal_1998 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN client_account ca ON t.account_id = ca.account_id
    WHERE t.date = '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN b1993.balance = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE (b1998.balance - b1993.balance) * 100.0 / b1993.balance
    END AS increase_rate
FROM bal_1993 b1993, bal_1998 b1998;	----- bird -----	financial

WITH male_loans AS (
  SELECT l.amount, strftime('%Y', l.date) AS yr
  FROM loan l
  JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
  JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
  JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
  WHERE c.gender = 'M'
)
SELECT 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1997' THEN amount END) - SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN amount END)) * 100.0 
  / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN amount END), 0) AS growth_rate
FROM male_loans;	----- bird -----	financial

518:
SELECT l.format, c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format IN (
    SELECT format
    FROM (
      SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM legalities
      WHERE status = 'Banned'
      GROUP BY format
    )
    WHERE cnt = (
      SELECT MAX(cnt)
      FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM legalities
        WHERE status = 'Banned'
        GROUP BY format
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY l.format, c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

944:
WITH race AS (
  SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champ_raw AS (
  SELECT r.time FROM results r
  JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
  WHERE r.position = 1 AND r.time IS NOT NULL
),
last_raw AS (
  SELECT r.time FROM results r
  JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
  WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY r.position DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
champ AS (
  SELECT
    (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':'))-1 AS REAL) * 3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1, INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))-1 AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1,
                 INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))+1, '.')-1) AS REAL) +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))+1, '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000
    ) AS sec
  FROM champ_raw
),
last AS (
  SELECT
    (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':'))-1 AS REAL) * 3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1, INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))-1 AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1,
                 INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))+1, '.')-1) AS REAL) +

       AVG(
          (CAST(substr(res.time,1,instr(res.time,':')-1) AS INTEGER))*3600 +
          (CAST(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1,
                     instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')-1) AS INTEGER))*60 +
          (CASE
               WHEN instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')),'.')>0
               THEN CAST(substr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')),1,
                                 instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')),'.')-1) AS INTEGER)
               ELSE CAST(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')) AS INTEGER)
           END) +
          (CASE
               WHEN instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')),'.')>0
               THEN CAST(substr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')), 
                                 instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1+instr(substr(res.time,instr(res.time,':')+1),':')),'.')+1) AS INTEGER)/1000.0
               ELSE 0
           END)
       ) AS avg_time_seconds

  CASE 
    WHEN cnt_in > cnt_out THEN 'in-patient'
    WHEN cnt_out > cnt_in THEN 'outpatient'

  ROUND((cnt_in - cnt_out) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cnt_out,0), 2) AS deviation_percent

  FROM Patient p
);	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

WITH LatestLab AS (
  SELECT l.ID, l.UA
  FROM Laboratory l
  JOIN (
    SELECT ID, MAX(Date) AS MaxDate
    FROM Laboratory
    GROUP BY ID
  ) md ON l.ID = md.ID AND l.Date = md.MaxDate
)
SELECT AVG(l.Ua) AS average_ua
FROM LatestLab l

WITH cust_czk AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
cons_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN cust_czk c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, MIN(cons.total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cons_2013 cons
    JOIN cust_czk c ON cons.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
agg AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2012,
         MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2013
  FROM yearly
  GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0) / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
  FROM agg
  WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2013 <> 0
)
SELECT Segment AS segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment AS segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  g.Country,
  COUNT(*) AS value_for_money_gas_stations
FROM (
  SELECT
    "GasStationID",
    AVG(Price / NULLIF(Amount,0)) AS avg_unit_price
  FROM "transactions_1k"
  WHERE Amount IS NOT NULL AND Price IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "GasStationID"
) s
JOIN gasstations g ON g.GasStationID = s."GasStationID"
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT AVG(Price / NULLIF(Amount,0)) AS overall_unit_price
  FROM "transactions_1k"
  WHERE Amount IS NOT NULL AND Price IS NOT NULL
) o
WHERE s.avg_unit_price < o.overall_unit_price
GROUP BY g.Country
ORDER BY value_for_money_gas_stations DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
